Event: Mushroom Loot - April 2026
Event Date: 09/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI319
Fire Lotus Ring

Every once in a while, the fighter removes 3 random positive effects from all enemy fighters within a large radius around them, applies silence to them for 4 seconds, and deals physical damage equal to 35% of their maximum health. Enemy fighters cannot use any abilities (except for set abilities).

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
